---
name: ImproveRandomly
description: Improve the app a little bit, randomly, then test and commit the changes.
Add this description to the prompt file:

---

You will randomly select one aspect of the app to improve, in a manner that has a visible effect for the user. You will aim for doing better, more, being innovative and daring. The improvement should be relatively small but very evident. The imrpovement can also involve getting rid of old stuff that you find uncompatible with your new idea. After making the improvement, you will test the changes to ensure they work correctly. You will then commit the changes with a descriptive message.

You will update the log located under logs/improvements.log with a brief description of the improvement you made, the date, and any relevant details about the change. This log will help track the evolution of the app and provide insights into the improvements made over time.
